description_long: This is a large, stately house surrounded by a ring of mature trees with purple and green foliage, creating a private, enclosed yard. The house features a light-colored brick or stone facade, multiple large windows, and a prominent central entryway with an arched portico. The structure includes two main stories with a complex roofline, combining gable and flat roof sections, and several chimneys. A spacious driveway leads to a three-car garage attached to one side of the house, while the rear of the house opens onto a covered patio or porch area. The landscaping is formal, with the trees forming a near-complete oval barrier around the property. Architectural details such as symmetrical window placement, decorative trim, and a grand entryway give the house a classic, upscale appearance.
description: A large, elegant two-story house with a light brick facade, arched entryway, and a three-car garage, surrounded by a ring of lush trees with purple and green foliage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with an arched portico, symmetrical windows, and the attached three-car garage with a wide driveway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage's gable roof, the driveway, and the dense tree line encircling the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back patio or porch, symmetrical window arrangement, and the continuous tree barrier.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the house's roof complexity, the patio area, and the oval arrangement of trees.
attribute_entryway_design: Grand arched entryway with steps, covered portico, and decorative trim
